name: How long do I have to file a claim after a factory machine accident in Utah?

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a claim after a factory machine accident in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah, you must report the injury to your employer within 180 days, though sooner is better. The formal filing limit is generally eight years, but delay significantly weakens your case.
